metadata.title: AlphaVest WealthOS Visual Process User Manual V4
metadata.boundary: V4 PDF production from the existing visual-process package; not production certification.

researchPrinciples.principle: Keep help task-focused, concise, searchable, and grounded in concrete steps.
Complex applications need clear workflow support, visible state, and reduced cognitive load.
Use consistent procedural instructions and input-neutral UI interaction wording.
Choose simple or complex procedure formats based on the task, not on route structure.
PDF content should preserve a logical reading order as far as the production pipeline allows.
The PDF should expose a meaningful document title and metadata where possible.
Tagged PDF and PDF/UA status must be handled honestly as a structural accessibility question.

researchPrinciples.source: PDF Association Tagged PDF Best Practice Guide
researchPrinciples.principle: Tagged PDFs require structural semantics, not only visual polish.

modules.title: Tenant becomes operational
modules.outcome: Tenant setup becomes a governed collaboration container.
modules.businessReason: A family-office workspace can become active before ownership, compliance, policy, and invitation context are aligned.
visibilitySequence: Internal setup visible to AlphaVest roles
Invited user sees only onboarding context
Client workspace is not treated as operational until gates are satisfied
modules.visibilityBoundary: Client workspace is not treated as operational until gates are satisfied
modules.readerTakeaway: A tenant is not just a record. It is the scoped collaboration container that makes later visibility and accountability possible.
modules.demoBoundary: The UI is navigable with demo data; broad persisted tenant governance transactions are not fully claimed.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show policy baseline, tenant readiness, and invitation as one activation relay.

modules.title: Client profile becomes usable shared family context
modules.outcome: Family context becomes shared, reviewed operating context.
modules.businessReason: Family information, relationships, governance roles, and objectives often sit in separate memories, emails, spreadsheets, and documents.
visibilitySequence: Analyst sees quality gaps and relationship context
Advisor sees decision-relevant context only after review
modules.visibilityBoundary: Advisor sees decision-relevant context only after review
evidenceAuditSequence: Profile edits should audit when material
Missing evidence creates review tasks or data quality issues
modules.readerTakeaway: The wealth map is not decoration. It is a shared model that tells every role what the family structure currently means and where uncertainty remains.
systemPrevents: advisory work based on memory alone
modules.demoBoundary: Profile and relationship screens are navigable with demo data; full persistence is still a stated implementation need.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show client context and wealth structure becoming shared review material.
screenshotPlan.handoffShown: client input -> analyst review -> advisor context

modules.title: Document chaos becomes verified evidence
modules.outcome: Raw documents become classified, checked, and evidence-ready.
modules.businessReason: Documents arrive from different people, in different formats, with uncertain sensitivity, entity links, and extracted facts.
visibilitySequence: Compliance sees evidence readiness when relevant
evidenceAuditSequence: Upload, extraction review, versioning, correction, verification, and evidence linking should be auditable
modules.readerTakeaway: A document becomes useful only when it is classified, checked, linked, and made available at the correct visibility level.
modules.demoBoundary: The manual documents demo UI and workflow intent; no real file storage or extraction transaction is claimed.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show document inventory and evidence vault as the conversion from file to proof.

modules.title: Signal becomes reviewed recommendation candidate
modules.outcome: Signals become reviewable recommendation candidates without becoming advice.
modules.businessReason: A signal, data gap, market prompt, or document expiry can be mistaken for advice if review boundaries are not explicit.
evidenceAuditSequence: Routing, request-data, and recommendation-prep actions should create traceable events
modules.readerTakeaway: The system keeps signals useful without letting them masquerade as advice.
systemPrevents: AI draft or signal becoming client advice
analyst review being treated as release
modules.demoBoundary: The J01 subset has demo-executable workflow actions; broad signal governance remains partial.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show internal-only signal review and advisor package before release.

modules.title: Advisor-approved package becomes compliance-controlled client visibility
modules.outcome: Advisor-approved work becomes client-visible only after compliance release.
modules.businessReason: Advisor approval can feel final, but in a regulated wealth workflow it cannot be the same as client release.
visibilitySequence: Client visibility begins only after release and permission check
modules.visibilityBoundary: Client visibility begins only after release and permission check
evidenceAuditSequence: Advisor approval, compliance release, block, and evidence request should all create audit lineage
modules.readerTakeaway: Client visibility is a controlled outcome, not a side effect of internal approval.
systemPrevents: advisor approval being treated as final
modules.demoBoundary: Release/block states are visible; broad release persistence remains a top implementation gap.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show advisor approval and compliance queue as separate gates.

modules.title: Client decision becomes evidence and review cadence
modules.outcome: Client decisions become evidence and future review cadence.
modules.businessReason: A client decision can disappear into email, meeting notes, or memory unless the decision, participants, rationale, and review date are captured together.
visibilitySequence: Advisor/compliance see outcome and evidence lineage
evidenceAuditSequence: Decision action, reason, participant action, and evidence package should be immutable/audited
modules.readerTakeaway: The client decision is not the end of the workflow; it becomes the start of evidence and future review discipline.
modules.demoBoundary: Decision surfaces are navigable; final decision/evidence package persistence remains incomplete.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show released decision and evidence lineage.

modules.title: Governance change becomes permission-safe access
modules.outcome: Access changes become governed permission state.
modules.businessReason: Family offices frequently need to adjust access, but access changes can silently overexpose sensitive client data.
visibilitySequence: Target user sees only approved role scope
modules.visibilityBoundary: Target user sees only approved role scope
evidenceAuditSequence: Sensitive role/access actions require second confirmation and audit
modules.readerTakeaway: Access is not a user setting. It is a governed collaboration boundary.
modules.demoBoundary: Demo actions are visible; governed access transactions remain incomplete.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show access and governance as controlled collaboration boundary.

modules.title: Communication escalation becomes recorded service context
modules.outcome: Communication escalation becomes recorded service context.
modules.businessReason: Complex advisory work often shifts between digital messages, calls, workshops, and specialists without preserving why the channel changed.
visibilitySequence: Client-visible messages are separated from internal notes
evidenceAuditSequence: Sensitive communication should audit; material calls can link to evidence
modules.readerTakeaway: Communication is part of the workflow state, not a side channel outside the system.
modules.demoBoundary: Communication surfaces are mostly static; message and call persistence is not claimed.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show channel escalation as service workflow state.

modules.title: Export request becomes redacted, approved, auditable package
modules.outcome: Export requests become redacted, approved, auditable packages.
modules.businessReason: Exporting data can break the system's visibility controls if scope, redaction, approval, expiry, and audit are not explicit.
visibilitySequence: Internal evidence may become redacted package
External sharing has expiry and classification
evidenceAuditSequence: Export create, scope, redaction, approval, generation, download, and share should audit
modules.readerTakeaway: An export is a controlled visibility event, not a simple download.
modules.demoBoundary: Export UI is navigable; file/share realism is a Phase 18 gap.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Use evidence/export surface to explain scoped redaction and auditable sharing.

modules.title: Ops monitoring turns workflow friction into service and product improvement
modules.outcome: Operational friction becomes service and product improvement evidence.
modules.businessReason: Workflow friction often remains anecdotal: someone knows a queue is slow, but the system does not show where or why.
visibilitySequence: Client-facing promises are not inflated by reference pages
modules.visibilityBoundary: Client-facing promises are not inflated by reference pages
evidenceAuditSequence: Ops mutations should audit when implemented and service-affecting
modules.readerTakeaway: AlphaVest uses operations feedback to keep the workflow model honest and continuously improve the shared state.
systemPrevents: reference pages being mistaken for product capability
modules.demoBoundary: Queue/SLA mutation is not fully implemented; reference pages are internal only.

screenshotPlan.whyTheyMatter: Show ops queues as workflow feedback and improvement surface.
